spec.title: Exporter
spec.description: Shows whether the Pi-hole exporter successfully completed its most recent scrape. A value of 1 means the exporter reached Pi-hole and collected metrics; 0 means the last scrape failed.

spec.title: Clients and Domains
spec.description: Tracks the number of active clients, total known clients, and unique queried domains reported by Pi-hole. Use this to spot client churn or unusual domain diversity over time.

spec.title: Query Types
spec.description: Breaks down queries by DNS record type, such as A, AAAA, HTTPS, or other types returned by Pi-hole.

spec.title: Query Status
spec.description: Breaks down queries by Pi-hole status, such as forwarded, cached, blocked by gravity, or other status values reported by Pi-hole.

spec.title: Replies
spec.description: Breaks down DNS replies by reply type, such as IP, NODATA, NXDOMAIN, or other reply values reported by Pi-hole.

spec.title: Top Client Queries
spec.description: Shows the aggregate total and blocked query counts from Pi-hole's top clients endpoint. The current exporter does not expose individual client labels, so this is not a per-client top list.

spec.title: Upstreams
spec.description: Shows forwarded and total upstream query counts reported by Pi-hole. Use this to compare upstream traffic against overall DNS query activity.

spec.title: Gravity Age
spec.description: Shows how many days have passed since Pi-hole last updated gravity, the blocklist database. Higher values indicate stale blocklists.

spec.title: Gravity Updated
spec.description: Shows the timestamp of the last Pi-hole gravity update. Gravity is Pi-hole's blocklist database built from configured blocklists and local entries.

spec.title: Scrape Duration
spec.description: Shows how long the exporter took to collect metrics from Pi-hole during the most recent scrape. Spikes can indicate Pi-hole API latency or connectivity issues.

spec.title: Blocked
spec.description: Shows the percentage of DNS queries blocked by Pi-hole. This is the current value reported by Pi-hole, not the number of blocked domains in gravity.

spec.title: Query Rate
spec.description: Shows the current average DNS query rate reported by Pi-hole in queries per second.

spec.title: Active Clients
spec.description: Shows the number of clients Pi-hole has seen recently, reported as active clients.

spec.title: Blocked Domains
spec.description: Shows the number of domains currently present in Pi-hole's gravity blocklist database. This is blocklist size, not blocked query count.

spec.title: DNS Query Rate
spec.description: Shows the current DNS query rate alongside an estimated blocked query rate derived from Pi-hole's total, blocked, and frequency metrics.

spec.title: Blocking Trend
spec.description: Shows the blocked query percentage over time. Use this to spot changes in blocking behavior after list updates, client changes, or configuration changes.

spec.title: Query Counters
spec.description: Shows Pi-hole's total, blocked, forwarded, and cached query counters over time. These are Pi-hole-reported counters for the selected instance.
